tooltip.realciv.community_hub: Deposit resources for profession credits and civ stock. Sneak + right-click to withdraw.
tooltip.realciv.census_block: View civ members, manage join requests, and send invitations.
tooltip.realciv.tax_block: Pay plot upkeep, adjust tax rates, and set tax collection items.
tooltip.realciv.civic_control_console: Manage governance, economy policies, leadership contests, and roles.
tooltip.realciv.profession_ledger: Track your profession levels, XP, and action limits.
tooltip.realciv.war_table: View and manage diplomatic relations with other civilizations.
realciv.ftbchunks.claim_denied: Claim denied by RealCiv rules. See chat for details.
realciv.ftbchunks.unclaim_denied: Unclaim denied by RealCiv rules. See chat for details.
